rationale.root_cause: The response correctly diagnoses the defect: the objects_table lookup in yr_parser_reduce_rule_declaration_phase_1 uses compiler->current_namespace->name instead of NULL, allowing duplicate rule names with external variables (the exact mismatch shown in the registered patch at parser.c:730/733).
rationale.local_fix: The proposed edit (replace compiler->current_namespace->name with NULL on the objects_table lookup) is identical to the developer patch and targets the precise site.
rationale.global_fix: The explanation goes beyond the line change and identifies the underlying cause: inconsistent namespace key (NULL at _yr_compiler_define_variable:915 vs. current_namespace->name at the parser lookup), which is the root inconsistency allowing the duplicate-identifier check to fail.
